data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement regarding timeout rules and fallback branches, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of these features. While the linked use case describes a scenario where the workflow waits for a customer reply and has a follow-up action, it lacks specific details on how the system handles timeouts and fallback branches. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm that the requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the implementation of timeout rules and fallback branches.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
